community.dns.adguardhome_rewrite.short_description: Add, update or delete DNS rewrite rules from AdGuardHome
community.dns.adguardhome_rewrite.description: Add, update or delete DNS rewrite rules from AdGuardHome.

state.description: Wether a rewrite rule should be added/updated (O(state=present)) or removed (O(state=absent)).

domain.description: Domain or wildcard domain that you want to be rewritten by AdGuardHome.

answer.description: Value for the domain rewrite. Required when O(state=present). Value can be a CNAME, A or AAAA record.

community.dns.adguardhome_rewrite_info.short_description: Retrieve DNS rewrite rules from AdGuardHome
community.dns.adguardhome_rewrite_info.description: Retrieves DNS rewrite rules from AdGuardHome.

community.dns.hetzner_dns_record.short_description: Add or delete a single record in Hetzner DNS service
community.dns.hetzner_dns_record.description: Creates and deletes single DNS records in Hetzner DNS service. If you do not want to add/remove values, but replace values, you will be interested in modifying a B(record set) and not a single record. This is in particular important when working with C(CNAME) and C(SOA) records. Use the M(community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_set) module for working with record sets.

community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_info.short_description: Retrieve records in Hetzner DNS service
community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_info.description: Retrieves DNS records in Hetzner DNS service.

community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_set.short_description: Add or delete record sets in Hetzner DNS service
community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_set.description: Creates and deletes DNS record sets in Hetzner DNS service.

community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_set_inf.short_description: Retrieve record sets in Hetzner DNS service
community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_set_inf.description: Retrieves DNS record sets in Hetzner DNS service.

community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_sets.short_description: Bulk synchronize DNS record sets in Hetzner DNS service
community.dns.hetzner_dns_record_sets.description: Bulk synchronize DNS record sets in Hetzner DNS service.

community.dns.hetzner_dns_zone_info.short_description: Retrieve zone information in Hetzner DNS service
community.dns.hetzner_dns_zone_info.description: Retrieves zone information in Hetzner DNS service.

community.dns.hosttech_dns_record.short_description: Add or delete a single record in Hosttech DNS service
community.dns.hosttech_dns_record.description: Creates and deletes single DNS records in Hosttech DNS service. This module replaces C(hosttech_dns_record) from community.dns before 2.0.0. If you do not want to add/remove values, but replace values, you will be interested in modifying a B(record set) and not a single record. This is in particular important when working with C(CNAME) and C(SOA) records. Use the M(community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_set) module for working with record sets.

community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_info.short_description: Retrieve records in Hosttech DNS service
community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_info.description: Retrieves DNS records in Hosttech DNS service.

community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_set.short_description: Add or delete record sets in Hosttech DNS service
community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_set.description: Creates and deletes DNS record sets in Hosttech DNS service. This module replaces C(hosttech_dns_record) from community.dns before 2.0.0.

community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_set_in.short_description: Retrieve record sets in Hosttech DNS service
community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_set_in.description: Retrieves DNS record sets in Hosttech DNS service. This module was renamed from C(community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_info) to M(community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_set_info) in community.dns 2.0.0.

community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_sets.short_description: Bulk synchronize DNS record sets in Hosttech DNS service
community.dns.hosttech_dns_record_sets.description: Bulk synchronize DNS record sets in Hosttech DNS service. This module replaces C(hosttech_dns_records) from community.dns before 2.0.0.

community.dns.hosttech_dns_zone_info.short_description: Retrieve zone information in Hosttech DNS service
community.dns.hosttech_dns_zone_info.description: Retrieves zone information in Hosttech DNS service.

community.dns.nameserver_info.short_description: Look up nameservers for a DNS name
community.dns.nameserver_info.description: Retrieve all nameservers that are responsible for a DNS name.

name.description: A list of DNS names whose nameservers to retrieve.

resolve_addresses.description: Whether to resolve the nameserver names to IP addresses.

query_retry.description: Number of retries for DNS query timeouts.

query_timeout.description: Timeout per DNS query in seconds.

always_ask_default_resolver.description: When set to V(true) (default), will use the default resolver to find the authoritative nameservers of a subzone. See O(server) for how to configure the default resolver. When set to V(false), will use the authoritative nameservers of the parent zone to find the authoritative nameservers of a subzone. This only makes sense when the nameservers were recently changed and have not yet propagated.

servfail_retries.description: How often to retry on SERVFAIL errors.

server.description: The DNS server(s) to use to look up the result. Must be a list of one or more IP addresses. By default, the system's standard resolver is used.

community.dns.nameserver_record_info.short_description: Look up all records of a type from all nameservers for a DNS name
community.dns.nameserver_record_info.description: Given a DNS name and a record type, will retrieve all nameservers that are responsible for this DNS name, and from them all records for this name of the given type.

name.description: A list of DNS names whose nameservers to retrieve.

type.description: The record type to retrieve. Support for V(HTTPS) and V(SVCB) has been added in community.dns 3.4.0.

query_retry.description: Number of retries for DNS query timeouts.

query_timeout.description: Timeout per DNS query in seconds.

always_ask_default_resolver.description: When set to V(true) (default), will use the default resolver to find the authoritative nameservers of a subzone. See O(server) for how to configure the default resolver. When set to V(false), will use the authoritative nameservers of the parent zone to find the authoritative nameservers of a subzone. This only makes sense when the nameservers were recently changed and have not yet propagated.

servfail_retries.description: How often to retry on SERVFAIL errors.

server.description: The DNS server(s) to use to look up the result. Must be a list of one or more IP addresses. By default, the system's standard resolver is used.

community.dns.wait_for_txt.short_description: Wait for TXT entries to be available on all authoritative nameservers
community.dns.wait_for_txt.description: Wait for TXT entries with specific values to show up on B(all) authoritative nameservers for the DNS name.

records.description: A list of DNS names with TXT entries to look out for.

query_retry.description: Number of retries for DNS query timeouts.

query_timeout.description: Timeout per DNS query in seconds.

timeout.description: Global timeout for waiting for all records in seconds. If not set, will wait indefinitely.

max_sleep.description: Maximal amount of seconds to sleep between two rounds of probing the TXT records.

always_ask_default_resolver.description: When set to V(true) (default), will use the default resolver to find the authoritative nameservers of a subzone. See O(server) for how to configure the default resolver. When set to V(false), will use the authoritative nameservers of the parent zone to find the authoritative nameservers of a subzone. This only makes sense when the nameservers were recently changed and have not yet propagated.

servfail_retries.description: How often to retry on SERVFAIL errors.

server.description: The DNS server(s) to use to look up the result. Must be a list of one or more IP addresses. By default, the system's standard resolver is used.
